zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Lenthall Esq.於大約1476年出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾拉福德時，他的父親William Lenthall28歲，母親Katherine Badley23歲。他與Elizabeth Wyllie在英國奧可福爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1548年1月16日在英國英格蘭享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Lenthall Esq.于大约1476年出生在英国英格兰奧可福爾拉福德时，他的父亲William Lenthall28岁，母亲Katherine Badley23岁。他与Elizabeth Wyllie在英国奧可福爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1548年1月16日在英国英格兰享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lenthall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 2 English: nickname, perhaps from Middle English, Old French lentil ‘lentil’, perhaps given to someone who grew or sold lentil seeds, used in cooking.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Lenthall Esq. was born about 1476, in Latchford, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Lenthall, was 28 and his mother, Katherine Badley, was 23. He married Elizabeth Wyllie in Oxfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 16 January 1548, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Lenthall Esq. est né environ 1476, à Latchford, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Lenthall, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Katherine Badley, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Wyllie à Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 16 janvier 1548, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.Aston Rowant, Oxfordshire, England, Unit: Aston Rowant, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Lenthall Esq. um 1476 in Latchford, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Lenthall 28 und seine Mutter Katherine Badley 23. Er hat in Oxfordshire, England Elizabeth Wyllie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 16. Januar 1548 im Alter von 73 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Lenthall Esq. è nato il circa 1476 nel Latchford, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Lenthall, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Katherine Badley, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Wyllie nel Oxfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 16 gennaio 1548, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Lenthall Esq.が約1476年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアラトチフォードで生まれた時，父William Lenthallは28歳，母Katherine Badleyは23歳であった。イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアでElizabeth Wyllieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1548年1月16日にイギリスイギリスで73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Lenthall Esq.(이)가 대략 1476년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 라트ch퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Lenthall(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Badley(은)는 23세였다. 그는 영국 스퍼드실르에서 Elizabeth Wyllie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1548년 1월 16일 영국 잉글랜드에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Lenthall Esq. nasceu aproximadamente 1476, em Latchford, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Lenthall, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Badley, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Wyllie em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 16 de janeiro de 1548, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Lenthall Esq. родился около 1476 г. в местности лачфорд, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Lenthall было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Badley, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Wyllie в местности оксфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 16 января 1548 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 73 лет.

Se casó con Elizabeth Wyllie en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 16 de enero de 1548, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 73 años.
